stages.title: Visual Candidate Authority
stages.next_unlock: Convert candidate connectors/components into measured topology_evidence.v1.

stages.title: Measured Pinout/Topology Authority
blockers: No measured topology_evidence.v1 is attached.
stages.next_unlock: Measure ground, no-short resistance, voltage, current, thermal, and unknown pins into topology_evidence.v1.

stages.title: Electrical Simulation Authority
blockers: No deterministic simulation model has run.
stages.next_unlock: Supply measured topology/netlist with source limits and load current.

stages.title: Controlled Bench Authority
blockers: No terminal controlled bench outcome proves the target function.
stages.next_unlock: Record current-limited first power, voltage/current logs, thermal result, and target function proof.
allowed_actions: scoped function demonstrated under recorded conditions
blocked_actions: repeatable release claim without release packet

required_measurements: Record passing ground/reference continuity and connector continuity evidence.
Record passing current draw/current-limit evidence during first power.
Record passing unpowered resistance/no-short evidence between power and ground.
Record passing thermal behavior after first power and output-function test.
Record passing voltage, polarity, and logic-level evidence under current limit.
Attach measured topology or continuity-backed pinout evidence before first power/splice.

test_kit_release_gate.reason: The module-level test suite exists, but a versioned netlist is required before deterministic simulation.

production_repair_authority.goal: Salvage and reuse useful low-voltage functions from this physical board; produce next bench actions before any splice or power authority.

missing_requirements: Attach specialist authority with status certified_release, authorized, or authority_ready.
Attach specialist authority signed_by or authorized_by.
Attach specialist authority certificate_id or authority_id.
Attach specialist authority issued_at or authorized_at timestamp.
Verify battery chemistry and cell type.
Verify cell count and pack topology.
Verify BMS/protection behavior.
Record cell balance result as passing.
Record charge/discharge result as passing.
Verify thermal containment.
Verify battery enclosure and strain relief.
Attach specialist authority with status certified_release, authorized, or authority_ready.
Attach specialist authority signed_by or authorized_by.
Attach specialist authority certificate_id or authority_id.

Record stored-energy discharge result as passing.
Record earth-bond result as passing.
Record leakage-current result as passing.
Verify fuse/protection behavior.
Verify creepage and clearance.
Verify high-voltage enclosure.
Attach specialist authority with status certified_release, authorized, or authority_ready.

Verify exposure limit compliance.

requirements: evidence_uri or artifact_uri for audit trail

missing_requirements: Attach production_release or release_manifest.
Assign a release_id or manifest_id.
Record released_by, approved_by, or release_operator_id.
Record released_at or approved_at timestamp.
Record production release scope statement.
Attach release artifact URI or test report URI.
Attach artifact-backed measurement evidence for every required production category.
Attach enough measurement artifacts to cover resistance, continuity, voltage, current, and thermal evidence.
Mark acceptance_reviewed or acceptance_checklist_complete true.
Record repeatability_count/sample_count/validated_unit_count >= 1.
release_manifest.claim_boundary: Release manifest is an audit contract; it does not expand scope beyond measured resources and authorized domain lanes.

claims.statement: Selected resources are explicit and scoped.
gaps: Select at least one production-scope resource.

gaps: Required capabilities are still missing from the selected resource set.

claim_boundary: Authority is stage-scoped. Qwen/LLM evidence can create visual candidates and measurement tasks, but only measured topology, deterministic simulation, controlled bench outcome, and release artifacts can advance power, splice, or production repair claims.
